after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-core-bench-after-d5dw cargo bench -p fj-core --bench core_baseline -- core/jaxpr_validate_large --sample-size 40 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3
after.comparison_note: rch did not expose a worker selector and scheduled the after run on a different worker; confidence is lowered, but the measured margin is large enough to keep the lever.

golden.semantic_summary: valid large Jaxpr remains ok; duplicate constvar, unbound input, output shadow, and unknown outvar error precedence preserved; canonical fingerprint cache is untouched

isomorphism_proof.ordering: validate_well_formed still traverses invars, constvars, equations, equation inputs, equation outputs, sub-jaxprs, and outvars in the same order and returns at the same checkpoints.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No ordering-dependent collection iteration is observed; FxHashSet is used only for membership and duplicate detection.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: The validation path does not inspect floating-point values beyond Atom shape and VarId bindings.
isomorphism_proof.rng: RandomState is not used; rustc_hash FxHashSet has deterministic hashing and no RNG seeding.
isomorphism_proof.fingerprint: canonical_fingerprint code and cache semantics are untouched.
